description: Wire classify-then-act into production (#120): SchedulerFactory.Create constructs+injects GateClassifier/BlockerRetry/CriticalityJudge/FileEscalationSink/AnswerFileConsumer; Scheduler performs classify-then-act at the needs-human/wave-checkpoint gate + resume consumes answers via ActionRunner→PromptComposer; RunCommand/ExitCodes surface the exit-2-with-pending-escalations code — so the wiring test goes green
